# Hacker News Trending MCP

> HN front page, full-text Algolia search, Show HN launch tracker, item & user lookup

This MCP server exposes 5 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `hn_top`: HN front-page stories — kind=top|best|new|ask|show|job. Up to 100 items.
- `hn_search`: Full-text search across stories + comments via Algolia.
- `hn_show_recent`: Recent Show HN launches with at least N points in the last K days.
- `hn_item`: Fetch a single HN item by id (story or comment).
- `hn_user`: HN user profile: karma, account age, recent submissions.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://hn-trending-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
